description:
Rust 驱动的多协议下载管理器，支持 HTTP/FTP/BitTorrent 磁力链接及 HLS/DASH 流媒体，智能多线程加速与浏览器无缝集成。精美界面，极致性能，永久免费，零广告。


[0.1.55] - 2026-07-05
🚀 新功能
- (settings) 新增 MCP 端点开关
- (mobile) 支持系统分享/URL scheme 唤起新建下载
- (win) 为 nmh 与 updater 嵌入 PE 版本信息资源
- (cli) 新增 add --local 内嵌引擎独立下载模式
- (extension) 简化 popup 拦截设置，移除文件类型编辑
- (feedback) 反馈可附带当天脱敏日志
- (release) 下载总数叠加历史旧渠道基础量
- (settings) 便携模式改用 exe 目录 settings.json 存储
- (scoop) 新增 Scoop 安装支持，提供官方与自托管 bucket
- (extension) 深扫响应体清单与 JSON 内嵌媒体 URL
- 检测已完成任务文件被删除/移动
🐛 问题修复
- (website) 下载量改为纯 GitHub 全量统计并缓存 12 小时
- (scoop) 调整 manifest 以对齐 Extras 规范
- (open-file) 改用裸路径打开修复 UWP 关联类型无反应
- (promotion) 修正 Unraid CA 模板通过扫描校验
- (promotion) CasaOS compose 补 x-casaos.id 字段
- (scoop) 移除官网中的官方 extras 源，直到满足准入条件
- (settings) 修复文件管理器命令无法清空
💼 其他
- 修复了Windows预览体验版 Experimental 的 Future Platforms (老 Canary 频道，29xxx版本) 分支长期出现的启动软件后出现白屏的情况 (#10)
🚜 重构
- (reveal) 合并定位文件与打开目录为单条命令
📚 文档
- (promotion) 新增 NAS 与开源生态推广物料
- (promotion) MCP 改走社区清单并记录渠道进展
- (website) 新增 Docker 与 NAS 部署文档
- (openapi) 同步 TaskDto 新增 fileMissing 字段
🎨 样式
- (mobile) 任务操作面板按控制/常规/危险分组
⚙️ 杂项任务
- 更新官网域名为 fluxdown.zerx.dev
[0.1.55] - 2026-07-05
🚀 Features
- (settings) Add MCP endpoint toggle
- (mobile) Support creating new downloads via system share/URL scheme
- (win) Embed PE version info resources for nmh and updater
- (cli) Add add --local standalone download mode with embedded engine
- (extension) Simplify popup interception settings, remove file type editing
- (feedback) Feedback can include the day's redacted logs
- (release) Add historical legacy channel base count to total downloads
- (settings) Portable mode now stores settings.json in the exe directory
- (scoop) Add Scoop install support with official and self-hosted buckets
- (extension) Deep scan response body manifests and JSON-embedded media URLs
- Detect completed task files being deleted/moved
🐛 Bug Fixes
- (website) Switch download count to pure GitHub full-count stats, cached for 12 hours
- (scoop) Align manifest with Extras conventions
- (open-file) Fix UWP-associated file types not responding by opening with a bare path
- (promotion) Fix Unraid CA template to pass scan validation
- (promotion) Add missing x-casaos.id field to CasaOS compose
- (scoop) Drop official extras source from site until criteria met
- (settings) Fix file manager command unable to be cleared
💼 Other
- Fixed a long-standing white screen issue after launching the app on the Windows Insider Experimental Future Platforms branch (the old Canary channel, 29xxx builds) (#10)
🚜 Refactor
- (reveal) Merge "locate file" and "open folder" into a single command
📚 Documentation
- (promotion) Add NAS and open-source ecosystem promotional materials
- (promotion) Move MCP to community list and track channel progress
- (website) Add Docker and NAS deployment docs
- (openapi) Sync TaskDto with new fileMissing field
🎨 Styling
- (mobile) Group task action panel by control/general/danger
⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks
- Update official website domain to fluxdown.zerx.dev
